title: The Bloodbath
subtitle: As the tributes stand on their podiums, the horn sounds.

events.text: {name} grabs a shovel.
{name} grabs a backpack and retreats.
{name} snatches a bottle of alcohol and a rag.
{name} finds a bow, some arrows, and a quiver.
{name} runs away with a lighter and some rope.
{name} snatches a pair of sais.
{name} grabs a sword.
{name} takes a handful of throwing knives.
{name} runs away from the Cornucopia.
{name} stays at the Cornucopia for resources.
{name} grabs a shield leaning on the Cornucopia.
{name} takes a spear from inside the Cornucopia.
{name} retrieves a trident from inside the Cornucopia.
{name} grabs a machete and sprints into the trees.
{name} snatches a medical kit and flees.
{name} grabs a canteen of water and disappears.
{name} takes a crossbow and a quiver of bolts.
{name} grabs a flail and swings it wildly while retreating.
{name} scoops up a bag of dried food and runs.
{name} finds a pair of combat gloves and puts them on.
{name} grabs a hatchet and disappears into the brush.
{name} sprints to the Cornucopia and back, snagging a knife belt.
{name} trips but recovers, clutching a water purification kit.
{name} finds a sleeping bag and a fire starter.
{name} grabs a jar of fishing bait while {name2} gets fishing gear.
{name} and {name2} fight for a bag. {name} gives up and retreats.
{name} and {name2} fight for a bag. {name2} gives up and retreats.
{name} rips a mace out of {name2}'s hands.
{name} and {name2} decide to team up and loot the Cornucopia together.
{name} shoves {name2} aside and grabs the last weapon.
{name} and {name2} split a bag of supplies and run in opposite directions.
{name} throws a knife into {name2}'s head.
{name} throws a knife into {name2}'s chest.
{name} stabs {name2} with a tree branch.
{name} stabs {name2} in the back with a trident.
{name} breaks {name2}'s neck over a crate of food.
{name} slits {name2}'s throat with a hunting knife.
{name} bludgeons {name2} with a metal pipe.
{name} impales {name2} on a spear.
{name} beats {name2} to death with a club.
{name} shoots {name2} through the chest with a crossbow.
{name} snaps {name2}'s spine over their knee.
{name} drives a sword through {name2}'s gut.
{name} smashes {name2}'s skull against the Cornucopia.
{name} and {name2} work together to drown {name3}.
{name}, {name2}, {name3}, and {name4} share everything they gathered before running.
{name} and {name2} corner {name3} and kill them for their supplies.
{name} and {name2} pin {name3} down and stab them repeatedly.
{name}, {name2}, and {name3} form an alliance and retreat together.
